incident_classes.required_action: block security-positive publication until release, provenance, package, and update evidence agree again
retain blocked status until the live packaged install and rollback drill passes
rebuild release-operations, credibility, and security publications from one coherent evidence set
demote runtime hardening claims and require runnable regression evidence before restoring them
fail closed and keep the affected evidence quarantined or blocked until disclosure compatibility is resolved

disclosure_rules: machine-owned checked-in trust and security outputs are the only public disclosure surface in this milestone
unresolved disclosure uncertainty must not be published as a trust-positive signal
sensitive external evidence follows the checked-in quarantine and disclosure compatibility policy
security publication must stay narrower than the live release, package, and runtime evidence
